# predicate

**Instance Property**

A predicate to be tested when evaluating the rule.

## Declaration

```swift
var predicate: NSPredicate { get }
```

## Discussion

When the rule is evaluated, GameplayKit tests this predicate against the GKRuleSystem object evaluating the rule.

## Evaluating a Rule

- **evaluatePredicate(in:)**: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the rule’s predicate has been satisfied in the context of the specified rule system.

items.description: Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the rule’s predicate has been satisfied in the context of the specified rule system.
